creator: lexa@libraw.com
text:
(In reply to Alex Tutubalin from comment #11)

(I forgot that I can connect a monitor to my home mail server/router)

Reproduced with PHYSICAL monitor/keyboard on it

service jail onestart jailname - starts ok on ttyv0 but not on ttyv1

FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p2


(please do not ask to upgrade: no way to reboot it for a next few days: If I leave my family without internet for a several minutes, it will be the last thing I do.)
